title: Nexus Facebook Ads Scraper Input
description: Configuration for Nexus Facebook Ads Scraper

startUrls.title: Start URLs
startUrls.description: URLs to start scraping from (e.g., https://www.facebook.com/ads/library/)

maxRequestsPerCrawl.title: Max Requests Per Crawl
maxRequestsPerCrawl.description: Maximum number of pages to scrape. Set 0 for unlimited.

maxConcurrency.title: Max Concurrency
maxConcurrency.description: Maximum number of concurrent browser pages.
